content.thinking: We need to say hello in 3 words. Common greetings: "Hello there friend" or "Hi how are" but that's not a complete greeting. "Hello my friend" is 3 words. Or "Greetings to you". Probably the simplest: "Hello, world." is 2 words. "Hello everyone" is 2. "Good morning" is 2. "Hi there!" is 2. So 3 words: "Hello to you" or "Hello my friend". The instruction is straightforward. I'll respond with "Hello, my friend."
